title: Low Pay Commission research
body: "The Low Pay Commission (LPC) each year commissions and publishes a range of independent research projects to inform its work. This page brings together all the projects the LPC has published since 2012.  Research projects from 2004 to 2012 can be found on the National Archives website.  Research from before 2004 is not currently available online. If there are pre-2004 projects you wish to access, please email us at lpc@lowpay.gov.uk. "
